sections.sectionTitle: Efesa Pawlpite tungah Gen ding Thu

verses.text: “Efesa khua-a pawlpi vantung mi kiangah lai gelh in la, a taklam khutah aksi sagih tawi-in, kham kibawl meivakna lakah a pai kawikawi Jesuh' thugenna hih bang ahi hi
“Note' nasepna, na gimna uh leh lungduai takin na thuakna uh, leh migilote koihmawk loin, sawltak hilo napi-in sawltak hi ung, a ci mite dongtelin sawltak ahihlohna uh na muhkhiatnate uh ka thei hi
Note in lungduai takin thuakin, keima min hangin thuakzo-in, lungkia hetloin na omna uh ka thei hi
Ahi zongin note ka hong mawhsakna khat om a, tua in: A masa lai-a kei na hong it bangun tu-in na hong it nawn kei uh hi

Tua ahih manin na lampialna uh phawkin, na mawhna uh panin kihei un la, na gamtat ngeisa bangun gamta kik un. Na mawhna panun kihei-in na kisikkik kei uh leh note kiangah hong pai-in na meivakna uh ka hong lakkhiatsak ding hi
Ahi zongin note ka hong pahtakna khat om a, tua in: Keima muhdah mah bangin Nikolas pawlte na mudah uh hi
Tua ahih manin zakna ding bil a neite in Kha Siangtho in pawlpite kiangah a gen thute na za un. A gualzo mite tungah, Pasian' Huan sunga om nuntakna singgahte a nektheihna dingun thu ka pia ding hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Smyrna Pawlpite tungah Gen ding Thu

verses.text: “Smyrna khua pawlpi vantung mi kiangah lai gelh in la, a kipatna leh a tawpna, si ngei napi-in a hingkikpa' thugen in

Na lungkhamnate uh leh na zawn'nate uh ka thei hi. A taktakin note a hau na hi uh hi. Jew mi hilo napi-in Jew mi ka hi uh hi, ci-in note a hong gensiatnate uh ka thei hi. Tua bang mite pen Satan' pawlte ahi uh hi

Na thuakding uh haksatnate kihta kei un. Dawimangpa in note pawlkhat thong sungah hong khia-in hong ze-et ding hi. Gimna na thuak hun ding uh ni sawm sung bek hi ding hi. Na sih dongun kei tungah hong citak un. Tua hi leh nuntakna lukhu ka hong pia ding hi
Tua ahih manin zakna ding bil a neite in Kha Siangtho in pawlpite kiangah a gen thute na za un. A gualzo mite, nihvei sihna in gimsakkha nawnlo ding hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Pergamum Pawlpi te tungah Gen ding Thu

verses.text: “Pergamum khua pawlpi vantung mi kiangah lai gelh in la, a langnihin a hiam mahmah namsau a neipa' thugen in

Satan in a kumpi tokhom a phuhna munah a om na hih lamtak uh ka thei hi. Keima thu citakin teci a pang cinten Antipas, Satan' omna munah a kithah hun laitak nangawnin kei na hong upna uh na khahsuah kei uh hi

Ahi zongin note ka hong mawhsakna ding thu tawmkhat a om hi. Milim biakna ante nesakin, nulepa paktatna piangsak a, Israel mite mawhna a gamtasak Balak tungah thu a hilh Balaam' thuhilhnate a um mi pawlkhat note lakah a om hi
Tua mah bangin Nikolas pawlte' thuhilhna a um mi pawlkhat zong note lak mahah a om hi
Tua ahih manin na mawhna panun kisikkik un. Na kisik kei uh leh note kiangah kei hong pai baihin, ka kam panin a pusuak namsau tawh amaute ka do ding hi

Tua ahih manin zakna ding bil a neite in Kha Siangtho in pawlpite kiangah a gen thute na za un. A gualzo mi tungah a kiselcip manna an pawlkhat leh min thak a kigelhna suangkang khat ka pia ding hi. Tua suangkang pen a ngahte simloh kuamah dang in theilo ding hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Thiatira Pawlpite tungah Gen ding Thu

verses.text: “Thiatira khua pawlpi vantung mi kiangah lai gelh in la, meikuang tawh a kibang mittang nei-in sumngo kihalsan tawh a kibang khe a nei Pasian' Tapa' thugen in
Note' gamtatna, itna na neihna, upna na neihna, na nasepna, lungduai takin na thuakna uh, leh a kipatcil lai sangin a nunung lamah na hoihzawknate uh ka thei hi

Ahi zongin note ka hong mawhsakna ding thu khat om hi. Kamsang numei ka hi, ci-in thu a gen Jezebel na nial kei uh hi. Ama thuhilhna hangin ka nasemte in numei-pasal paktatna gamta-in milim biakna ante a ne uh hi
Tua numei a kisikkikna ding hun ka piak hangin a paktatna panin kihei nuamlo hi
Tua ahih manin tu-in tua numei tawh a paktatna uh panin a kisikkik kei uh leh tua numei leh amah tawh a paktat mi khempeuh, lupna ngaksakin nakpi takin gimna ka thuaksak ding hi

Tua numei' thu a zui mi khempeuh ka that ding hi. Tua hi leh, mihingte' ngaihsutna leh lungsim a kantelpa ka hihna thu pawlpi khempeuh in thei ding uh hi. Note' gamtatna ciat tawh kizui-in ka hong thukkik ding hi

Ahi zongin Thiatira khua-a om note pawlkhat in tua numei' thuhilhna hoihlote na zui kei uh a, mite in, ‘Satan' thu thukpite hi,’ a cih thute na sukha kei uh hi. Note tungah vangik bangmah ka hong suan kei ding hi
Ka hong pai matengin na neihsateng uh na lenkip ta un

A gualzo, a tawp dongin keima deihna bangin a gamtazo mite tungah, keimah in ka Pa tung panin ka ngah vangliatnate mah ka pia ding hi. Minam dangte tungah ukna a neihna ding uh aana ka pia ding a, leibeel satkhap bangin sik ciangkhut tawh minam dangte satgawp ding uh hi
Amaute tungah zingsol zong ka pia ding hi
Tua ahih manin zakna ding bil a neite in Kha Siangtho in pawlpite kiangah a gen thute na za un.
